data.body: Vision note from brainstorm (dso-t7af): Eventually, each sub-agent dispatched by sprint/debug-everything should work in a separate worktree using worktree isolation, running the code review process and testing in parallel on each sub-agent worktree before merging results back into the session's worktree. This would eliminate file-conflict risk from parallel agents and allow true independent validation per sub-agent. This is out of scope for the parallel agents epic (dso-t7af) — in the short run we accept the risk of larger commits with increased parallelism.
